[RaptorProtocol.sendETHToFee(uint256)](RaptorProtocol.sol#L881-L885) sends eth to arbitrary user

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in RaptorProtocol._transfer(address,address,uint256) (RaptorProtocol.sol#725-849):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (RaptorProtocol.sol#789)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (RaptorProtocol.sol#863-875)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (RaptorProtocol.sol#795)
		- _feeAddress.transfer(amount) (RaptorProtocol.sol#883)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (RaptorProtocol.sol#847)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (RaptorProtocol.sol#1005)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (RaptorProtocol.sol#985)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (RaptorProtocol.sol#987)
	RaptorProtocol._rOwned (RaptorProtocol.sol#403) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- RaptorProtocol._takeTeam(uint256) (RaptorProtocol.sol#999-1007)
	- RaptorProtocol._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (RaptorProtocol.sol#957-995)
	- RaptorProtocol.balanceOf(address) (RaptorProtocol.sol#551-555)
	- RaptorProtocol.constructor() (RaptorProtocol.sol#485-515)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (RaptorProtocol.sol#847)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (RaptorProtocol.sol#1013)
	RaptorProtocol._rTotal (RaptorProtocol.sol#415) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- RaptorProtocol._getCurrentSupply() (RaptorProtocol.sol#1155-1165)
	- RaptorProtocol._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (RaptorProtocol.sol#1011-1017)
	- RaptorProtocol.constructor() (RaptorProtocol.sol#485-515)
	- RaptorProtocol.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (RaptorProtocol.sol#647-669)
